title: Doodled - Tools and Swords
body:
[![MesoMods Banner](https://files.catbox.moe/2coczi.webp)](https://zap-hosting.com/mesomods?voucher=MesoMods-2998)
![---------------------------------------------------](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4da0e42e3d0dbcc8daa812e1cd6a80f0c49e3f56_0.webp)
 
 **THIS RESOURCE PACK USES HIGH RESOLUTION GRAPHICS AND CAN AFFECT YOUR PERFORMANCE!**
 
![--------------------------------------------------](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4da0e42e3d0dbcc8daa812e1cd6a80f0c49e3f56_0.webp)
_Doodled - Tools and Weapons_ adds a unique set of new textures in a drawn style, replacing the old look of all **Swords, Axes, Pickaxes, Shovels and Hoes**. All textures were drawn on paper and then scanned to place them into the game. The resource pack aims to provide new textures that look very simillar to the vanilla textures, with the twist that they were drawn with pens. As mentioned above does the texture pack use a resolution as high as **600x600px** to achieve the drawn look and can impact your performance as of fewer FPS etc. because of that

This resource pack is the first part of a series where we draw all Minecraft textures and add them into the game, so other textures will follow in other ressource packs soon.



## FAQ
<details>
<summary>Am I allowed to...?</summary>

You are allowed to include this resource pack in your modpack.

</details>
